---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for Lattice
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here. If this feature exists in Google Sheets or Excel, describe how it works there.
